examples: The results are expressed in descending numerical order.
All the other ingredients, including water, have to be listed in descending order by weight.
The descending rock is substantially cooler than the surrounding mantle and hence is less ductile and much more liable to fracture.
Altitude sickness can be easily treated by descending immediately and allowing your body to acclimatise slowly.
At midnight, the 1, 070-pound ball ushers in the New Year, descending 77 feet in 60 seconds.
